data.html:
Algorithm 1：Training algorithm of INIT
Pretrain the embedding model φ
Initialize the generator G and the discriminator D
for the number of training epochs do
Darw a training sample batch
G forward propagates，producing 1-hop target images
D forward propagates
Calculate sample importance weights by Eq.7
Draw intermediate attributes
G forward propagates，producing multi-hop target images
D forward propagates
Calculate L data = E xs ，as ~p data [logD(xs ， as)]
Calculate Lg by Eq.10
Calculate L=L data + Lg
Optimize G by minimizing L
Optimize D by maximizing L
end
